description_long: This object is a long, straight-edged blade with a rectangular profile, likely made of dark metal or stone, and features a consistent width along its length. The surface is dark, possibly black or deep gray, with a speckled or marbled texture that suggests a stone-like or forged metal material. There are no visible serrations, curves, or tapering, giving the blade a utilitarian, almost monolithic appearance. The handle is not distinctly separated from the blade, indicating a full-tang or integrated design, and there are no visible ergonomic features or grip textures. No guard or crossguard is present, and the object lacks any visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The overall form is minimalist and functional, suitable for use as a heavy-duty kitchen or utility knife, or possibly a sword with a simple, robust design.
description: A long, straight, rectangular blade with a dark, speckled surface and no visible handle separation or ornamentation. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, with a monolithic appearance.
description_view_0: A narrow edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade.
description_view_1: A full-length side view revealing the rectangular, straight-edged blade and dark, speckled surface.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, identical to view 0, emphasizing the thinness of the object.
description_view_3: A full-length side view similar to view 1, showing the opposite face of the blade with the same dark, marbled texture.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, rectangular, no visible grip or ergonomic features
